_runner: dev-workstation (not SBC) — baselines are for regression-delta detection, not absolute SBC budget. Per docs/plans/2026-04-30-phase-7-performance.md Risk #9 mitigation: regenerating this baseline requires devex-engineer + performance-engineer + ci-gatekeeper + human infra-approved: trailer.
_capture_command: cargo test --features bench --release --test churn -- --nocapture opi_profile_20w_2048e rpi_profile_32w_4096e bursty_one_visible_change reconnect_diff_full_cap

_regression_thresholds._note: Enforced by performance-engineer agent on hot-path PRs from TASK-117 onwards. Bench-broken-blocker clause is exempted for TASK-116 only.

opi_profile_20w_2048e._description: 20 widgets / 2048 entities / OPI Zero 3 profile. Tests build_tiles when total HA entities >> visible widgets.

rpi_profile_32w_4096e._description: 32 widgets / 4096 entities / RPI4 profile. Steady-state RPI cap.

bursty_one_visible_change._description: Single visible entity flips state inside a 4096-entity store; both apply_event and build_tiles measured.

reconnect_diff_full_cap._description: Reconnect-style diff: N=4096 (RPI cap) entity updates applied back-to-back into a fresh store, then one build_tiles. Per-sample populate is the inner loop summing 4096 apply_event calls (so populate p50 ≈ 4096 × per-event apply cost in this captured run).

_notes: Numbers were captured on the dev workstation in --release mode. They are not SBC absolute budgets; the per-profile budget targets live in docs/dev/PERFORMANCE.md.

The performance-engineer agent reviews TASK-116 for baseline-sanity only (representative scenarios + appropriate runner annotation). Bench-broken-blocker clause is exempted for this PR because TASK-116 IS the restoration.
From TASK-117 onwards, hot-path PRs that regress any p50 by >5%, p95 by >10%, allocate >+1 per event, or grow total bytes by >10% will block on performance-engineer review.

Regenerating this baseline (re-running cargo test against the bench scenarios on a different runner) requires the same approval chain as any other protected-path change: devex-engineer + performance-engineer + ci-gatekeeper + human infra-approved: trailer.
